name: Custom Objects API
description: Add new custom objects to Geometry Dash!

issues.info: Please submit any issues / requests to the mod's GitHub page!

editor-tab.name: Enable Editor Tab
editor-tab.description: Add a separate editor tab for custom objects. This is required for creating a level with custom objects, however it's not needed to play levels with custom objects, which is why it's disabled by default.
editor-tab.enable-if-description: The mod "EditorTab API" by Alphalaneous must be installed and enabled!

force-generation.name: Force Spritesheet Generation
force-generation.description: Always generate the spritesheets on game launch and ignore the cache, useful for debugging.

disable-aa.name: Disable Anti-Aliasing
disable-aa.description: Disables the anti-aliasing effect applied to the custom objects spritesheet, some textures may look better with this setting enabled.
